productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boys Printed Navy Blue T-shirt

Stylized with an interesting graphic print, team it with shorts and comfy footwear for that super cool look.Product DetailsMidnight navy blue round neck T-shirt, has short sleeves, graphic print and appliqué design on the front, and brand tag on the hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash in cold water using a mild detergent with like coloursDo not tumble dry, bleach or soakWash and dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron on print/embroidery
